title: Educator - Canada.ca
content:
Educators play a primary role in the lives of children and young adults. In this section we have identified articles that can contribute to curriculums developed in primary and secondary schools, colleges, and universities.
A joint publication of Health Canada and the Public Health Agency of Canada, It's Your Health ( IYH ) is a series of over 150 articles on a wide range of health and safety issues. From environmental health to food safety to healthy lifestyles, these articles provide reliable information that will help you and the young people you teach lead healthier lives.
To view all the articles available go to the complete alphabetical list or subscribe to IYH to be notified electronically whenever an article is updated or a new article is released. Subscribe now .
- Clinical Trials and Drug Safety
- Tanning and your health
Looking for another topic? Here is a list of articles for educators. Educator - The full list
